---
title: "404"
page-layout: full
---

<style>
.quarto-title-block {
  text-align: center;
}
</style>

<div style="padding: 3rem 0; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">

<div style="display: flex; gap: 3rem; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;">

<!-- Cat GIF on the left -->
<div style="flex: 0 0 250px;">
<img src="https://media.giphy.com/media/VbnUQpnihPSIgIXuZv/giphy.gif" style="width: 100%; border-radius: 0.375rem; border: 2px solid #000;">
</div>

<!-- Content on the right -->
<div style="flex: 1; min-width: 300px;">

<div style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
Page Not Found
</div>

<div class="project-excerpt project-excerpt--yellow" style="margin-bottom: 2rem; text-align: left;">
If it is supposed to be here but isn't then please do rest assured that I am working on fixing it. In the meantime, feel free to explore other sections of my website using the links below.
</div>

<div style="display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
<a href="/" class="btn btn-primary">🏠 Go Home</a>
<a href="/projects.html" class="btn btn-success">📁 View Projects</a>
<a href="/cv.html" class="btn btn-info">📄 See My CV</a>
<a href="/about.html" class="btn btn-light">👋 About Me</a>
</div>

<div style="color: #000000; font-size: 0.875rem;">
If you believe this is an error, please check the URL or contact me.
</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
